mapper.select:
SELECT -- 평균 요청 비율 AVG( CASE WHEN (checkpoints_req + checkpoints_timed) > 0 THEN (checkpoints_req::NUMERIC / (checkpoints_req + checkpoints_timed) * 100) ELSE 0 END ) AS avg_checkpoint_req_ratio,
-- 평균 Write 시간 AVG(checkpoint_write_time) AS avg_write_time,
-- 평균 Sync 시간 AVG(checkpoint_sync_time) AS avg_sync_time,
-- 평균 Total 시간 AVG(checkpoint_write_time + checkpoint_sync_time) AS avg_total_time,
-- 총 시간 기반 Checkpoint 횟수 SUM(checkpoints_timed) AS total_checkpoints_timed,
-- 총 요청 기반 Checkpoint 횟수 SUM(checkpoints_req) AS total_checkpoints_req,
-- 총 WAL 생성량 SUM(wal_bytes) AS total_wal_bytes,
-- 총 버퍼 처리량 SUM(buffers_checkpoint) AS total_buffers_checkpoint
FROM checkpoint_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO checkpoint_agg ( instance_id, collected_at, avg_checkpoint_req_ratio, avg_write_time, avg_sync_time, avg_total_time, total_checkpoints_timed, total_checkpoints_req, total_wal_bytes, total_buffers_checkpoint, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{avgCheckpointReqRatio}, #{avgWriteTime}, #{avgSyncTime}, #{avgTotalTime}, #{totalCheckpointsTimed}, #{totalCheckpointsReq}, #{totalWalBytes}, #{totalBuffersCheckpoint}, #{status}, NOW() )
